## PiPipe class

Library-first wrapper around `uWebSockets.js` that exposes a built-in Pi RPC route and lets callers add their own HTTP and WebSocket handlers.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare class PiPipe 
```

## Remarks

`PiPipe` always reserves the built-in Pi RPC route at `${wsPrefix}/pi`<!-- -->. Additional HTTP handlers can be attached with `handle()`<!-- -->, additional WebSocket endpoints can be attached with `route()`<!-- -->, and advanced direct `uWebSockets.js` customization can be attached with `use()`<!-- -->.
